key: The recoil the body currently has. Increases when weapon is fired, and decreases naturally.
The minimal Y speed for the entity to take damage.
The health amount lost per Y speed unit when above the fall damage treshold. that means when set to 5, they entity will lose 5 health points for every speed unity above the treshold.
Set this to the torso of the entity (not upper torso). Used in physics calculations.
The transform of the gun in the body. Should be a child of Arms.
The transform of the gun in the animation body.
